productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Multi Coloured Blanco Shoes
description: Style NoteThese low-top shoes from buckaroo blend vintage styling with a contemporary colour block trend. These classic lace ups with a leather inner gives off a stylish vibe. Style this pair with denims or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirtProduct Details Green and mustard lace-up shoe with red and mustard lacesSoft lining and footbed with colourful midfoot overlaysTPU outsole with square nubs and two suction pointsMaterial and CareLeatherWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
